overview: A premium personal portfolio website for Meghana Suvarna, a CSBS (Computer Science and Business Systems) student. Features a dark mode design with neon gradient accents, glassmorphism UI, and smooth scroll animations across hero, about, skills, projects, education timeline, and contact sections.
features: Animated hero with floating gradient blobs and neon glow CTAs
Categorized skills with animated progress indicators
Interactive project cards for Skill-O-Scope and CarbonSense AI with hover effects
Education and certification timeline with animated connectors
Modern contact form with animated send button and social links
Full glassmorphism design with backdrop blur and soft shadows
Fully responsive on mobile, tablet, and desktop
